content: I'm not a fan of communities. I really like to see less but read more. Than to navigate through all crap. If it's possible - answer me here.

Hi @gozubli,
These group chats can be overwhelming, can you share a bit more of what kind of solution you have in mind? Do you know of another programming language or open source project that does this well?

I really like to see less but read more.

Are you describing the signal to noise ratio? I think you have no control over your personal (subjective!) "noise level" other than to develop noise filters. The form of the filters and the nature of development process can vary.
